Event: Cornucopia Island December 2025
Event Date: 24/12/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: SP18
Master of the Festival Spear

Critical hits deal triple damage. When attacking, has a [8%-10%] chance of landing a penetrating blow that will deal quadruple damage.
Once in a while, the unit gains a lightning aura for 5 sec. For that duration, whenever the unit takes damage from an enemy unit, it has a 20% chance to cast electric pulse upon the unit that dealt the damage for 4 sec. Each time the unit affected by the electric pulse uses an ability, a lightning bolt hits it, causing it and all enemy units in a small radius to receive 300000 magic damage. All affected units are also stunned for 1,5 sec. Besides, the ability's primary target has their physical and magic armor reduced by 25% for 4 sec., and it receives 400000 magic damage for 4 sec. When attacking while the lightning aura is active, the spear wielder causes a lightning to strike a random enemy unit, dealing 600000 pure damage to the target.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Cornucopia Island December 2025

Event date: 24/12/2025

Sage bot code: SP18

First trigger: 6 sec

Cooldown: 10 secs
